Meets.Name: March 14 I District Finals

TeamFootnotes.Text: Tie broken by head-to-head record of teams.

QuizzerFootnotes.Text: Tie couldn't be broken by tie breaking rules.

Meets.TeamRankingLabel: Ranked by win/loss record. 2-way ties broken by head-to-head matches and 3+-way ties broken by points.
Meets.QuizzerRankingLabel: Ranked by average points, then by total quiz outs.
